features: 2 Sheets Gold Foil Hen Party Tattoos】 "Complete set includes 2 premium tattoo sheets (15x10cm) with 24 total temporary tattoos - enough for the entire bridal squad. Metallic gold foil designs withstand 3-5 days of wear through spa days and nightclub outings."

Bridal Shower Temporary Tattoos】 "Easy-application designs feature 'Bride Squad' and floral motifs in UK-popular styles. Hypoallergenic adhesive safely sticks to sensitive skin during extended wedding weekend celebrations."

【Laser-Cut Bride Squad Designs】 "Precision-cut edges create clean lines without background film residue. Intricate lace and champagne bottle patterns (2-4cm sizes) complement typical British hen party outfits."

【Bachelorette Party Favors】 "Individually packaged in protective sleeves for elegant distribution as wedding favours. Set divides perfectly among 8-12 guests at UK-style afternoon tea parties or cocktail evenings."

【Wedding Celebration Stickers】 "Multi-purpose use: apply to skin, phone cases, or champagne flutes. Removes cleanly with baby oil without damaging delicate fabrics at hotel sleepovers or countryside retreats."
description: Product description 2 Sheets Gold Foil Hen Party Tattoos- Bridal Shower Accessories Temporary Tattoos Set with Laser-Cut Bride Squad Designs, Bachelorette Party Favors & Wedding Celebration Stickers for Girls Night Directions 1. Choose the pattern you like and gently remove the transparent film. 2. Place the patterned face down on the skin. 3. Wet the tattoo with water until it is fully permeated (warm water works better). 4. Press for 20-30 seconds, then gently remove the backing paper. To remove, use alcohol or baby oil to rub the pattern repeatedly. Safety Warning NO See more
